sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19782" key="beloulkiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βελουλκ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n19782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βελουλκία</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
